component.name: FujiNet Go Adam
component.summary: Self-contained Coleco ADAM with built-in FujiNet

description.p: A Coleco ADAM (and ColecoVision) with FujiNet built in: mount disk and data-pack images from TNFS servers or the local SD folder, configure everything through the embedded FujiNet web UI, and play with automatic gamepad support. For developers it includes a full debugger with breakpoints, stepping, instruction history, EOS/OS7 symbols, and live VDP table viewers.
